content:
![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/09/front_balcony.jpg)

For the past 32 years (almost exact), this is the view I see everytime I look out to the front of the house.

Well, the prop might change from time to time but the view stays the same. ;)

And obviously, it is raining.
